defs: The work of one who makes images or visible representation of objects; imitation work; images in general, or in mass.
quotes: In those oratories might you see Rich carvings, portraitures, and imagery.
What can thy imagery of sorrow mean?

defs: The work of the imagination or fancy; false ideas; imaginary phantasms.
quotes: The imagery of a melancholic fancy.

defs: Rhetorical decoration in writing or speaking; vivid descriptions presenting or suggesting images of sensible objects; figures in discourse.
quotes: I wish there may be in this poem any instance of good imagery.
